query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE, COLUMN_DEFAULT FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'ideas' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
